member.summary: Best-effort health indicator. True when started, the underlying process hasn't exited, and background loops are still running.

member.summary: Raised when an internal transport error is observed.

member.summary: Raised when the engine process exits.

member.summary: Raised for lines received from redirected stderr.

member.summary: Initializes a new process-backed transport with default transport options.

Optional process arguments passed to the engine.
Optional working directory used when starting the engine.

member.summary: Initializes a new process-backed transport with explicit options.
member.param: Path to the engine executable.
Optional process arguments passed to the engine.
Optional working directory used when starting the engine.
Transport behavior overrides; when , defaults are used.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.IsHealthy
member.summary: Gets a best-effort signal indicating whether the process and background loops are still healthy.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.IsStarted
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the transport has been started and not yet fully stopped or disposed.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.BackpressureEvents
member.summary: Gets the number of times a write encountered channel backpressure.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.LinesRead
member.summary: Gets the number of stdout lines read from the engine.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.LinesWritten
member.summary: Gets the number of command lines written to the engine.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.Status
member.summary: Gets the current lifecycle state for the transport.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.ReadLinesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads lines from the UCI engine's stdout.
member.param: Cancellation token to stop reading.
member.returns: An async enumerable of lines read from the engine.
member.exception: Thrown if transport is not started or is disposed.
member.remarks: If SingleReader option is true, only one concurrent reader is allowed. The enumerable will complete when the transport is stopped or the process exits.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the UCI engine process and initializes the transport.
member.param: Cancellation token to cancel the start operation.
member.exception: Thrown if the process fails to start or file system validation fails.
Thrown if the cancellation token is triggered.
member.remarks: This method is idempotent - calling it multiple times concurrently will result in only one start operation. If the transport is already started and alive, this method returns immediately. Thread-safe: Multiple concurrent calls are serialized via internal gating.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.StopAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gracefully stops the UCI engine process and cleans up resources.
member.param: Cancellation token to cancel the stop operation.
member.exception: Thrown if the cancellation token is triggered.
member.remarks: Sends "quit" command to the engine if SendQuitOnStop option is true. Waits for graceful process exit before forcefully terminating if necessary. Thread-safe: Multiple concurrent calls are serialized via internal gating. If transport is not started, this method completes immediately with no operation.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.WriteLineAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes a command line to the UCI engine's stdin.
member.param: The command line to send to the engine.
Cancellation token to cancel the write operation.
member.exception: Thrown if transport is not started, disposed, or process is not alive.
Thrown if the cancellation token is triggered.
member.remarks: This method will wait indefinitely if the channel is full (backpressure). A warning is logged if the write is blocked for longer than . Use TryWriteLineAsync with a timeout if you need bounded wait time. Command validation is performed if ValidateCommands option is true.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.TryWriteLineAsync(System.String,System.TimeSpan,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempts to write a command line to the UCI engine's stdin with a timeout.
member.param: The command line to send to the engine.
Maximum time to wait for the write operation. Use TimeSpan.Zero for immediate return, or Timeout.InfiniteTimeSpan for no timeout.
Cancellation token to cancel the write operation.
member.returns: True if the line was successfully written within the timeout; false if the timeout expired.
member.exception: Thrown if timeout is negative (except Timeout.InfiniteTimeSpan).
Thrown if transport is not started, disposed, or process is not alive.
Thrown if the cancellation token is triggered (not timeout expiration).
member.remarks: For very small timeouts (≤1ms), uses busy-waiting to reduce context switching overhead. Command validation is performed if ValidateCommands option is true.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously disposes the transport and the underlying engine process.
member.returns: A task that completes when teardown has finished.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.Dispose
member.summary: Synchronous dispose implementation. Prefer for async scenarios.
member.remarks: WARNING: This synchronous dispose blocks the calling thread until all async cleanup operations complete. This can potentially cause deadlocks if called from a synchronization context (e.g., UI thread). Always prefer when possible. This method is provided only for compatibility with code that requires synchronous IDisposable (e.g., using statements without await).

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.ProcessHasExitedSafe(System.Diagnostics.Process)
member.summary: Safely checks if a process has exited, handling race conditions.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.ValidateAndCreateArgsList(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Validates and creates an immutable list of arguments, ensuring no null values.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.WriteWithHangWarningAsync(System.Threading.Channels.ChannelWriter{System.String},System.String,System.TimeSpan,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes to the channel with a warning if the operation is blocked for too long.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.AwaitReadLoopsCompletionAsync
member.summary: Awaits completion of read loops and nulls the lines channel.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.CleanupAfterFailedStartAsync
member.summary: Cleans up resources after a failed start attempt. This includes canceling loops, disposing streams, and killing the process if necessary.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.CleanupProcessAsync(System.Diagnostics.Process,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Cleans up process, killing if necessary and waiting for exit.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.CleanupWriteLoopAndStdinAsync(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Cleans up write loop and stdin stream.

member.summary: Orchestrates graceful shutdown: wait for exit, then force kill if necessary.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.KillProcessAfterGracePeriodAsync(System.Diagnostics.Process,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Exception})
member.summary: Force kills the process after the grace period has expired.

member.summary: Immediately kills the process if it hasn't already exited.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.TearDownCoreAsync(System.Boolean,Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.TransportStatus,System.String)
member.summary: Core teardown logic for stopping or disposing the transport. Cleans up all resources in the proper order: read loops, write loops, streams, and process.
member.param: Whether to send "quit" command before closing stdin.
The final status to set after teardown completes.
Log message to write after successful teardown.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.WaitForGracefulExitAsync(System.Diagnostics.Process)
member.summary: Waits for the process to exit gracefully within the grace period.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.ProcessUciTransport.CancelReadLoopAndDisposeStreams
member.summary: Cancels read loop and disposes stdout/stderr streams (but does not await loop completion).

member.summary: Fires the Exited event exactly once, even if called multiple times. Handles exceptions from user event handlers to prevent them from propagating.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions
member.summary: Options for controlling process-based UCI transport behavior and performance.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Options for controlling process-based UCI transport behavior and performance.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.KillEntireProcessTree
member.summary: When true (and supported by the runtime), attempts to kill the entire process tree on forced termination.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.OutgoingSingleWriter
member.summary: If only a single producer calls WriteLine/TryWriteLine concurrently, set to true for slightly lower overhead.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.RedirectStandardError
member.summary: Redirect stderr only when explicitly requested to minimize overhead.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.SendQuitOnDispose
member.summary: When disposing, send "quit" to the engine before shutdown.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.SendQuitOnStop
member.summary: When stopping the transport, send "quit" to the engine.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.SingleReader
member.summary: If only a single reader consumes lines, set to true for lower overhead; disables multithreaded demux.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.ValidateCommands
member.summary: By default, validates engine commands for correctness and protocol compliance.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.StderrEncoding
member.summary: Custom encoding to use for reading engine stderr output; if null, use platform default.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.StdinEncoding
member.summary: Custom encoding to use for writing to engine stdin; if null, use platform default.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.StdoutEncoding
member.summary: Custom encoding to use for reading engine stdout output; if null, use platform default.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.ChannelCapacity
member.summary: Capacity of the async channel used for outgoing messages to the engine. Tune for high-throughput scenarios.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.FlushBatchSize
member.summary: Number of writes to batch before flushing stdin; increases throughput at the potential cost of latency.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.MaxLineLength
member.summary: Maximum allowed length for a command line in characters. Commands exceeding this limit will be rejected. Default is 10MB (10,485,760 characters) - a generous safety ceiling for pathological cases.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.QuitGracePeriodMs
member.summary: Grace period in milliseconds to wait after sending "quit" before forcing termination, when is not set.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.SmallTimeoutSpinIterations
member.summary: Number of spin iterations for very short timeouts in TryWriteLineAsync; set to 0 to disable busy spinning.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.WarnLineLength
member.summary: Line length threshold in characters at which a warning will be logged. This helps identify unusual usage patterns. Default is 1MB (1,048,576 characters) - typical UCI commands should be much smaller.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.NewLine
member.summary: Newline sequence used when writing engine commands; defaults to .

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.QuitGracePeriod
member.summary: Time-based preferred grace period to wait after sending "quit"; if zero, is used.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.TeardownTimeout
member.summary: Bounded timeout for teardown and wait operations (such as waiting for process exit or joining async loops).

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.WriteHangWarningThreshold
member.summary: Time threshold for logging a warning when WriteLineAsync is blocked waiting for channel space. Set to to disable hang warnings.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.OnQuitSent
member.summary: Test-only callback invoked when "quit" command is sent to the process. Used for verification in tests.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.DisableWriteLoop
member.summary: Test-only hook to deterministically exercise backpressure code-paths. Defaults to false; no production impact.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.API.Types.ProcessUciTransportOptions.WaitForProcessExitAsyncOverride
member.summary: Test-only hook to override asynchronous process-exit waits. Defaults to the platform process wait behavior.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.Domain.Common.Constants.UciConstants.Fen.BLACK_ALREADY_MATE

member.name: F:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.Domain.Common.Constants.UciConstants.Fen.BLACK_ALREADY_STALEMATE
member.summary: Position that is already stalemate for the side to move. Black: Kh8; White: Kg6, Qf7; Black to move has no legal moves and is not in check.

member.summary: Position where the side to move is in check (but not checkmated). Black: Ke8; White: Re1; Black to move and in check.

member.summary: Position where side to move (Black) can deliver mate in one. Black: Kh3, Qg3; White: Kh1; Black to move plays Qg2#.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.Domain.Common.Constants.UciConstants.Fen.BLACK_STALEMATE_IN_ONE
member.summary: Position where side to move (Black) can force stalemate in one. Black: Kg3, Qf3; White: Kh1; Black to move plays Qf2 to stalemate.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.Domain.Common.Constants.UciConstants.Fen.STANDARD
member.summary: Standard starting position in FEN notation

member.name: F:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.Domain.Common.Constants.UciConstants.Fen.WHITE_ALREADY_MATE
member.summary: Position that is already checkmate for the side to move (White). White: Ka1; Black: Kb3, Qb2; White to move and checkmated.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.Domain.Common.Constants.UciConstants.Fen.WHITE_ALREADY_STALEMATE
member.summary: Position that is already stalemate for the side to move (White). White: Kh1; Black: Kg3, Qf2; White to move has no legal moves and is not in check.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.Domain.Common.Constants.UciConstants.Fen.WHITE_CHECK
member.summary: Position where the side to move is in check (but not checkmated) — White to move. White: Ke1; Black: Re8; White to move and in check.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.Domain.Common.Constants.UciConstants.Fen.WHITE_MATE_IN_ONE
member.summary: Position where side to move can deliver mate in one. White: Kh6, Qg6; Black: Kh8; White to move plays Qg7#.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Chess.UCI.Protocol.Domain.Common.Constants.UciConstants.Fen.WHITE_STALEMATE_IN_ONE
member.summary: Position where side to move can force stalemate in one. White: Kg6, Qf6; Black: Kh8; White to move plays Qf7 to stalemate.
